name: task
description: Chat-first task workflow: discuss freely, then fix the discussion into a Markdown artifact under .task/ with one short skill (to-task / to-plan / to-roadmap / to-spec). No execution skill — any session told to implement the artifact follows its stamped Execution block through /verify + /code-review to commit. 5 skills, zero subagents — roadmap-to-workflow is a thin dynamic-Workflow wrapper, not hand-rolled orchestration.
